mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO dataportal.dh_meta_schema ( project_id, schema_id, dh_dscr, datahub_layer, dh_env, timezone, use_yn, del_yn, dh_rgst_dt, dh_modi_dt, rgst_id, rgst_dt, modi_id, modi_dt ) VALUES
( #{item.projectId}, #{item.schemaId}, #{item.dhDscr}, #{item.datahubLayer}, #{item.dhEnv}, #{item.timezone}, #{item.useYn}, #{item.delYn}, #{item.dhRgstDt}, #{item.dhModiDt}, #{item.rgstId}, #{item.rgstDt}, #{item.modiId}, #{item.modiDt} )
ON CONFLICT (project_id, schema_id) DO UPDATE SET dh_dscr = EXCLUDED.dh_dscr, datahub_layer = EXCLUDED.datahub_layer, dh_env = EXCLUDED.dh_env, timezone = EXCLUDED.timezone, dh_rgst_dt = EXCLUDED.dh_rgst_dt, dh_modi_dt = EXCLUDED.dh_modi_dt, modi_id = EXCLUDED.modi_id, modi_dt = EXCLUDED.modi_dt
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dataportal.dh_meta_schema WHERE del_yn = 'N' and project_id = #{projectId} and schema_id = #{schemaId}

update.foreach: UPDATE dataportal.dh_meta_schema SET use_yn = #{item.useYn}, ww_dscr = #{item.wwDscr}, modi_id = #{modiId}, modi_dt = NOW() WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND project_id = #{item.projectId} AND schema_id = #{item.schemaId}

mapper.update: UPDATE dataportal.dh_meta_schema SET use_yn = #{useYn}, ww_dscr = #{wwDscr}, modi_id = #{modiId}, modi_dt = NOW() WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND project_id = #{projectId} AND schema_id = #{schemaId}
